name: npc-reply-humanlike-feedback
title: feedback: NPC reply feels too robotic
description: Record real user feedback: NPC replies feel too robotic / too much like human-machine interaction.
scope: human chat-quality feedback record only; no code changes
creator: lijin
notes: Recorded real human feedback: user disliked the feel of NPC replies and described them as too robotic / too much human-machine feel. Main risk: even if doorway and first-use affordances improve, the core chat product fails if NPC replies do not feel alive, situated, and role-consistent.

meta.feedback_type: real user NPC reply quality feedback
meta.feedback_quote: [皱眉]我不喜欢回话的感觉；人机感太重
meta.core_risk: NPC response naturalness may fail the human-feel test after the user reaches chat
caveats: Single real-user signal recorded as UX evidence; collect transcripts/screenshots before changing prompts or runtime behavior
Do not infer whether the cause is model, prompt, fallback, UI timing, or character-card quality until reproduced
